Australia

United States

Brazil

Canada

What is Canada doing to prevent wildfires? Canada has created the pan-Canadian Wildland Fire Prevention and Mitigation group. The goals of of this group is to educate the public, to enhance colaboration of the public, strengthen partnerships, and expand investments in prevention methods. These methods include fighting fire with fire. This means using prescribed fires to clear up built up fuel in the forests. Burning this reduces the chaances of a devistating fire.

Left column

Australia

Why do wildfires burn so much more land in Australia? Brush fires in Australia are their main source of wildfires. These fires can get so intense when they don’t need brush to burn. These fires have the ability to use the oxyegen in the soil to burn for a long period of time and travel a far distance. So what is Australia doing to prevent these? Local governments have started implementing new home building techniques. You now need to build with some fire resistant materials to help prevent loss of a home and to hopefully prevent wildfires from spreading.
